scripts.test:extension: python3 -m json.tool extension/manifest.json >/dev/null && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/options.js && node --check extension/lib/targets.js && node extension/tests/parser.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:extension && npm run test:collector && npm run test:encode
